Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8000 "NEILANDROID-8000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "NEIL Android.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $99E3. However the true start address is $8000.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
